authority: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
overview: Regulates apprenticeship training in designated trades and prescribes obligations for employers engaging apprentices.

definitions.definition: A person undergoing apprenticeship training under a contract of apprenticeship.
Any person employing apprentices under the Act.
Training provided in accordance with the Apprentices Act.

rules.title: Review Applicability of Apprentices Act
rules.description: Assess whether the establishment is required or eligible to engage apprentices under the Act.

rules.title: Execute Apprenticeship Contract
rules.description: Execute apprenticeship contracts wherever apprentices are engaged.

rules.title: Provide Prescribed Training
rules.description: Provide apprenticeship training in accordance with the approved training programme.

rules.title: Pay Prescribed Stipend
rules.description: Pay stipend to apprentices in accordance with applicable provisions.

rules.title: Maintain Apprentice Records
rules.description: Maintain records relating to apprenticeship contracts, attendance and training.

exceptions.title: Trade and Establishment Specific Requirements
exceptions.description: Apprenticeship obligations vary depending on the establishment, designated trade and applicable notifications.
